name: Saudi National ID (Iqama/National ID)
description: Detects Saudi Arabian national ID and residence permit (Iqama) numbers. Requires a keyword label (national id, iqama, or Arabic equivalents) because the bare 10-digit format collides with NPIs, phone numbers, and other global IDs.

metadata.format: 10 digits (National ID: starts with 1, Iqama: starts with 2)
metadata.note: Covers both citizens (National ID) and residents (Iqama)
metadata.pattern_rationale: Bare \b[12][0-9]{9}\b collides with US NPIs (10 digits, starts with 1/2), NANP phone numbers, and many other IDs. Keyword label required to anchor the match. Accepts English (national id, iqama) and Arabic (هوية, إقامة, رقم الهوية).

effect.message: Saudi national ID tokenized for de-identification
